name: 15q11_2_BP1_BP2_burnside_butler
description: 15q11.2 BP1-BP2 region (Burnside-Butler susceptibility region) immediately proximal to the Prader-Willi/Angelman critical interval (BP2-BP3). Recurrent ~500 kb microdeletion encompassing TUBGCP5, CYFIP1, NIPA1, NIPA2 mediated by directly-oriented HERC2/GOLGA8-paralog LCRs at BP1 and BP2. Variable expressivity: developmental delay, autism, schizophrenia, epilepsy.

architecture.internal_structure: BP1 and BP2 SD blocks (~200-400 kb each at >99% identity) flanking the unique CYFIP1/NIPA1/NIPA2/TUBGCP5 core; HERC2P3, GOLGA8 paralogs dominate the SD.
